class.name: alohamini_base_control/AlohaMiniBaseHardware
class.description: Hardware interface for the AlohaMini three-omniwheel base (Feetech STS3215, velocity mode). Exposes per-wheel velocity command and velocity/position state.

class.name: alohamini_base_control/OmniBaseController
class.description: Omni-drive controller mapping /cmd_vel to three wheel velocities and publishing /odom (+ TF) from wheel velocity feedback.
